title: Manizales, CL — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Manizales, CL: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Manizales is a city in CL with a population of 400,000. A highland city in the coffee axis, known for its stunning views of the Nevado del Ruiz volcano and coffee culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
